name: Apple Lokshen (Noodle) Kugel (Sweet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the noodles and put them in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the melted margarine or oil and beaten eggs.
3. Peel and chop the apples. If using raisins, rinse them in hot water and drain.
4. Combine all ingredients together, adding seasoning and mixing well.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Pour the kugel mixture into a greased 9-inch x 13-inch baking pan.
7. Bake for 40-60 minutes or until lightly browned. Makes 12 servings.
8. For extra softness, add another 2 eggs.
Variation: Pineapple Kugel
Replace apples and raisins with one 16 oz can of crushed pineapple. Add an additional 1/2-3/4 cup of sugar and 1 teaspoon cinnamon.
